Solo guitarra 4 compases OJO METRÓNOMO PISTA QUE NO EMPIEZA BIEN
B C B C
Living easy, livin' free
Season ticket, on a one way ride
Asking nothing, leave me be
Taking everything in my stride

Don't need reason, don't need rhyme
Ain't nothin' that I’d rather do
Going down, party time
My friends are gonna be there too CRESCENDO

I'm on the highway to hell
On the highway to hell
Highway to hell
I'm on the highway to hell

No stop signs, speed limit
Nobody's gonna slow me down
Like a wheel, gonna spin it
Nobody's gonna mess me 'round

Hey, Satan!
Paid my dues
Playin' in a rockin' band
Hey, mama! Look at me
I'm on my way to the promised land CRESCENDO

I'm on the highway to hell
Highway to hell

Highway to hell

CRASH CRASH CRASH

Show must go on
songs.lyrics:
:: INICIO SOLO GUITARRA Y VOZ
Empty spaces
What are we living for?
Abandoned places
I guess we know the score. :: ACARICIAR PLATOS
On and on
Does anybody know what we are looking for? :: ACARICIAR PLATOS

Another hero
Another mindless crime
Behind the curtain
In the pantomime
Hold the line :: ACARICIAR PLATOS

Does anybody want to take it anymore?
:: ENTRAMOS TODOS EN "ANYMORE"

The show must go on
The show must go on, yeah
Inside, my heart is breaking
My makeup may be flaking
But my smile still stays on
:: BREVE SILENCIO ACARICIANDO PLATOS

Whatever happens
I'll leave it all to chance
Another heartache
Another failed romance
On and on
Does anybody know what we are living for?

I guess I'm learning (I'm learning)
I must be warmer now
I'll soon be turning (turning, turning, turning)
Round the corner now
Outside, the dawn is breaking
But inside in the dark I'm aching to be free

The show must go on
The show must go on (yeah, yeah)
Ooh, inside, my heart is breaking
My makeup may be flaking
But my smile still stays on

:: SOLO
(Yeah, yeah)
(Oh, oh, oh)

My soul is painted like the wings of butterflies
Fairytales of yesterday will grow, but never die
I can fly, my friends

The show must go on, yeah
The show must go on
I'll face it with a grin
I'm never giving in
On with the show

Ooh, I'll top the bill, I'll overkill
I have to find the will to carry on
(On with the show)
(On with the show)
The show (the show must go on)
:: FINAL DE TODOS JUNTOS EN SECO

songs.title: Zombie

8 compases de dinámica alta (4 vueltas)
4 compases de dinámica baja (2 vueltas)
y entra la voz
Em - C - G - D
Another head hangs lowly
Child is slowly taken
And the violence caused such silence
Who are we mistaken?
Em - C - G - D
But you see, it's not me
It's not my family
In your head, in your head, they are fighting
With their tanks and their bombs
And their bombs, and their guns
In your head, in your head they are crying
A LA CAJA
In your head, in your head
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie
What's in your head, in your head
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie-ie, oh

Du, du, du, du
Du, du, du, du
Du, du, du, du
Du, du, du, du

TOM EN LUGAR DE CAJA

When the violence causes silence
We must be mistaken

It's the same old theme
Since nineteen-sixteen
In your head, in your head, they're still fighting
With their tanks and their bombs
And their bombs, and their guns
In your head, in your head, they are dying
A LA CAJA
In your head, in your head
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie
What's in your head, in your head

songs.lyrics:
She's got a smile that it seems to

Where everything was as fresh

She takes me away to that special place
And if I stare too long

I'd probably break down and cry

Oh, oh, oh, sweet child of mine

As if they thought of rain
I hate to look into those eyes
And see an ounce of pain

And pray for the thunder and the rain
To quietly pass me by

songs.lyrics:
:: Estrofa 1
Deep down in Louisiana, close to New Orleans
Way back up in the woods among the evergreens
There stood a log cabin made of earth and wood
Where lived a country boy named Johnny B. Goode
Who never ever learned to read or write so well
But he could play a guitar just like a-ringin' a bell
:: Estribillo 1
Go, go
Go, Johnny, go, go
Go, Johnny, go, go
Go, Johnny, go, go
Go, Johnny, go, go
Johnny B. Goode
:: Estrofa 2
He used to carry his guitar in a gunny sack
Go sit beneath the tree by the railroad track
Oh, the engineers would see him sittin' in the shade
Strummin' with the rhythm that the drivers made
People passin' by they would stop and say
Oh my, but that little country boy can play
:: Estribillo 2
Go, go
Go, Johnny, go, go
Go, Johnny, go, go
Go, Johnny, go, go
Go, Johnny, go, go
Johnny B. Goode
:: Solo de Nino
:: Sollo de Miguel
:: Paradas 
:: G____G____G__G__GGGG
:: Continúamos una vuelta
:: G____G____G__G__GGGG
:: Solo de Pedro
:: Estrofa 3
His mother told him: Some day you will be a man
And you will be the leader of a big old band
Many people comin' from miles around
To hear you play your music 'till the Sun go down
Maybe someday your name will be in lights
Sayin': Johnny B. Goode tonight
:: Estribillo 3
Go, go
Go, Johnny, go
Go, go, go, Johnny, go
Go, go, go, Johnny, go
Go, go, go, Johnny, go
Go
Johnny B. Goode
Day Tripper
songs.title: Johnny B. Good

songs.title: Maniac
songs.lyrics:
:: Entramos todos juntos ¿CON METRÓNOMO?
B A NEGRAS - Charles a semicorcheas - C 2-4
Just a steel town girl on a Saturday night
Looking for the fight of her life
In the real-time world, no one sees her at all
They all say she's crazy

Locking rhythms to the beat of her heart
Changing movement into light
She has danced into the danger zone
When the dancer becomes the dance

It can cut you like a knife
If the gift becomes the fire
On the wire between will and what will be

She's a maniac, maniac on the floor
And she's dancing like she's never danced before
She's a maniac, maniac on the floor
And she's dancing like she's never danced before

On the ice-blue line of insanity
Is a place most never see
It's a hard-won place of mystery
Touch it, but can't hold it

You work all your life for that moment in time
It could come or pass you by
It's a push-shove world, but there's always a chance
If the hunger stays the night

There's a cold kinetic heat
Struggling, stretching for the peak
Never stopping, with her head against the wind

She's a maniac, maniac at your door
And she's dancing like she's never danced before
She's a maniac, maniac at your door
And she's dancing like she's never danced before

Oh! Oh! Oh! Oh!....
SOLO
It can cut you like a knife
If the gift becomes the fire
On the wire between will and what will be

She's a maniac, maniac at your door (at your door)
And she's dancing like she's never danced before
She's a maniac, maniac at your door
And she's dancing like she's never danced before

Maniac, maniac at your door
And she's dancing like she's never danced before

songs.lyrics:
Verso en shuffle, pequeños redobles en caja
Billo charles corcheas semiabierto
Solo y final al ride

She always takes it with a heart of stone
'Cause all she does is throws it back to me
I've spend a lifetime looking for someone
Don't try to understand me
Just simply do the things I say

Love is a feeling, give it when I want it
'Cause I'm on fire, quench my desire
Give it when I want it, talk to me woman
Give in to me, give in to me

You always knew just how to make me cry
And never did I ask you questions why
It seems you get your kicks from hurting me
Don't try to understand me
Because your words just aren't enough

Love is a feeling, quench my desire
Give it when I want it, takin' me higher
Love is a woman, I don't wanna hear it
Give in to me, give in to me

You and your friends were laughing at me in town
But it's okay, and it's okay
You wont be laughing girl when I'm not around
I'll be okay, and I'll, I'll not find
Gotta, the peace of mind, no
SOLO
Don't try to tell me
Because your words just aren't enough

Love is a feeling, quench my desire
Give it when I want it, takin' me higher
Talk to me woman, love is a feeling
Give in to me, give in to me, give in to me

Oh! Love is the feeling, I don't wanna hear it
Quench my desire, takin' me higher
Tell it to the preacher, satisfy the feeling
Give in to me, give in to me
SOLO y desate total de guitarra!!
I don't wanna, I don't wanna
I don't wanna hear it, give it to the fire
Talk to me woman, quench my desire
I don't like a lady, talk to me baby
Give in to me

Give in to the fire, give in to me
Give in to me, give in to me
Love is a woman

Give in to me, give in to me
Give in to me, give in to me
'Cause I'm on fire, talk to me woman
Quench my desire, give in to the feelin'

songs.title: Purple Rain
songs.lyrics:
Arranca con una caja en 2 en cuarto compase y acariciar platos en 4
I never meant to cause you any sorrow
I never meant to cause you any pain
I only wanted one time to see you laughing
I only wanted to see you laughing in the purple rain  
:: Crash detenido
Purple rain, purple rain
Purple rain, purple rain
Purple rain, purple rain
I only wanted to see you bathing in the purple rain 
:: Crash detenido
I never wanted to be your weekend lover
I only wanted to be some kind of friend
Baby, I could never steal you from another
It's such a shame our friendship had to end
:: Crash detenido
Purple rain, purple rain
Purple rain, purple rain
Purple rain, purple rain
I only wanted to see you underneath the purple rain
:: Crash detenido
Honey, I know, I know
I know times are changing
It's time we all reach out for something new
That means you too
You say you want a leader
But you can't seem to make up your mind
I think you better close it
And let me guide you to the purple rain
:: Crash detenido
Purple rain, purple rain
Purple rain, purple rain, whoa
If you know what I'm singing about up here  
(Purple rain, purple rain)
I only want to see you
I only want to see you
In the purple rain
:: S O L O 
whoa, whoa x 3
whoa, whoa x 3
whoa, whoa x 3
:: Última vuelta y final en 1 rompiendo platos.....

songs.title: It's my life
songs.notes:
TOM TOM 
TOM TOM al inicio
FINAL SECO EN 4 con Caja
songs.lyrics:
This ain't a song for the broken-hearted
No silent prayer for faith-departed
I ain't gonna be just a face in the crowd
You're gonna hear my voice when I shout it out loud
TOM TOM en 1 y 2 Volvemos 1 siguiente compás
It's my life, it's now or never
I ain't gonna live forever
I just want to live while I'm alive
(It's my life) my heart is like an open highway
Like Frankie said: I did it my way
I just wanna live while I'm alive
It's my life
TOM TOM SILENCO EN 1
2 COMPASES 
This is for the ones who stood their ground
For Tommy and Gina who never backed down
Tomorrow's getting harder, make no mistake
Luck ain't even lucky, got to make your owns breaks
:: SILENCIO 1 COMPÁS
It's my life, it's now or never
I ain't gonna live forever
I just want to live while I'm alive
(It's my life) my heart is like an open highway
Like Frankie said: I did it my way
I just wanna live while I'm alive
'Cause it's my life
SOLO
:: SILENCIO EN 1
Better stand tall when they're calling you out
Don't bend, don't break, baby, don't back down

It's my life, it's now or never
I ain't gonna live forever
I just want to live while I'm alive
(It's my life) my heart is like an open highway
Like Frankie said: I did it my way
I just wanna live while I'm alive
It's my life

It's now or never
I ain't gonna live forever
I just want to live while I'm alive
(It's my life) my heart is like an open highway
Like Frankie said: I did it my way
I just wanna live while I'm alive

songs.notes: OJO a partes de Notas de guitarra alternados con golpes de caja
songs.lyrics:
The warden threw a party in the county jail
The prison band was there and they began to wail
The band was jumpin' and the joint began to swing
You should've heard those knocked out jailbirds sing
:: Arranca rock & roll
Let's rock, everybody, let's rock
Everybody in the whole cell block
Was dancin' to the Jailhouse Rock
:: Golpes de caja con guitarra
/1Spider Murphy played the tenor saxophone
/1Little Joe was blowin' on the slide trombone
/1The drummer boy from Illinois went crash, boom, bang
/1The whole rhythm section was the Purple Gang
:: Continúa rock & roll
Let's rock, everybody, let's rock
Everybody in the whole cell block
Was dancin' to the Jailhouse Rock
:: Golpes de caja con guitarra
/1Number forty-seven said to number three
/1You're the cutest jailbird I ever did see
/1I sure would be delighted with your company
/1Come on and do the Jailhouse /1Rock with me
:: Continúa rock & roll
Let's rock, everybody, let's rock
Everybody in the whole cell block
Was dancin' to the Jailhouse Rock
:: SOLO
:: Golpes de caja con guitarra
/1The sad sack was a sittin' on a block of stone
/1Way over in the corner weepin' all alone
/1The warden said: Hey, buddy, don't you be no square
/1If you can't find a partner, use a wooden chair
:: Continúa rock & roll
Let's rock, everybody, let's rock
Everybody in the whole cell block
Was dancin' to the Jailhouse Rock
:: Golpes de caja con guitarra
/1Shifty Henry said to Bugsy: For /1Heaven's sake
/1No one's lookin', now's our chance to make a break
/1Bugsy turned to Shifty and he said: Nix, nix
/1I wanna stick around awhile and get my kicks!
:: Continúa rock & roll
Let's rock, everybody, let's rock
Everybody in the whole cell block
Was dancin' to the Jailhouse Rock
Dancin' to the Jailhouse Rock

Dancin' to the Jailhouse Rock
Dancin' to the Jailhouse Rock
Dancin' to the Jailhouse Rock
songs.title: Jailhouse rock
Hotel California
songs.lyrics:
//espera=52
On a dark desert highway
Cool wind in my hair
Warm smell of colitas
Rising up through the air
Up ahead, in the distance
I saw a shimmering light
My head grew heavy and my sight grew dim
I had to stop for the night
//espera=2
There she stood, in the doorway
I heard the Mission bell
And I was thinking to myself
This could be heaven or this could be hell
Then she lit up a candle and she showed me the way
There were voices down the corridor
I thought I heard them say
//espera=2
Welcome to the Hotel California
Such a lovely place
(Such a lovely place)
Such a lovely face
Plenty of room at the Hotel California
Any time of year
(Any time of year)
You can find it here
//espera=2
Her mind is Tiffany-twisted
She got the Mercedes-Benz
She got a lot of pretty, pretty boys
That she calls friends
How they dance in the courtyard
Sweet summer sweat
Some dance to remember
Some dance to forget
//espera=2
So I called up the captain
Please, bring me my wine
He said: We haven't had that spirit here since
Nineteen sixty-nine
And, still, those voices are calling from far away
Wake you up in the middle of the night
Just to hear them say
//espera=2
Welcome to the Hotel California
Such a lovely place
(Such a lovely place)
Such a lovely face
They're livin' it up at the Hotel California
What a nice surprise
(What a nice surprise)
Bring your alibis
//espera=2
:: PUENTE
/0Mirrors on the ceiling
/0The pink champagne on ice
/0And she said: We are all just prisoners here
/0Of our own device
/0And in the master's chambers
/0They gathered for the feast
/0They stab it with their steely knives
/0But they just can't kill the beast
//espera=2
Last thing I remember
I was running for the door
I had to find the passage back
To the place I was before
Relax, said the night man
We are programmed to receive
You can check out any time you like
But you can never leave
songs.notes:
Arranca solo la guitarra, si eso acariciar platos, 2 vueltas. Comienzo con dos golpes de base+caja
//img=hotel-california-groove.jpg

songs.title: Gimme Gimme Gimme
songs.lyrics:
:: UNOS COMPASES DE GUITARRA Y ENTRAMOS
:: RITMO DISCO
Half-past twelve. :: BREVE SILENCIO
And I'm watching the late show in my flat, all alone
How I hate to spend the evening on my own

Autumn winds
Blowing outside the window as I look around the room
And it makes me so depressed to see the gloom

There's not a soul out there
No one to hear my prayer

Gimme, gimme, gimme a man after midnight
Won't somebody help me chase the shadows away?
Gimme, gimme, gimme a man after midnight
Take me through the darkness to the break of the day

Movie stars
Find the end of the rainbow with a fortune to win
It's so different from the world I'm living in

Tired of TV
I open the window and I gaze into the night
But there's nothing there to see, no one in sight

There's not a soul out there
No one to hear my prayer

Gimme, gimme, gimme a man after midnight
Won't somebody help me chase the shadows away?
Gimme, gimme, gimme a man after midnight
Take me through the darkness to the break of the day

Gimme, gimme, gimme a man after midnight
Gimme, gimme, gimme a man after midnight

There's not a soul out there
No one to hear my prayer

Gimme, gimme, gimme a man after midnight
Won't somebody help me chase the shadows away?
Gimme, gimme, gimme a man after midnight
Take me through the darkness to the break of the day

Gimme, gimme, gimme a man after midnight
Won't somebody help me chase the shadows away?
Gimme, gimme, gimme a man after midnight
Take me through the darkness to the break of the day

songs.title: Born to be wild
songs.lyrics:
Get your motor running
Head out on the highway
Looking for adventure
And whatever comes our way

Yeah, darling, gonna make it happen
Take the world in a love embrace
Fire all of your guns at once and
Explode into space

I like smoke and lightning
Heavy metal thunder
Racing in the wind
And the feeling that I'm under

Yeah, darling, gonna make it happen
Take the world in a love embrace
Fire all of your guns at once and
Explode into space

Like a true nature's child
We were born, born to be wild
We can climb so high
I never wanna die

Born to be wild
Born to be wild

Get your motor running
Head out on the highway
Looking for adventure
And whatever comes our way

Yeah, darling, gonna make it happen
Take the world in a love embrace
Fire all of your guns at once and
Explode into space

Like a true nature's child
We were born, born to be wild
We can climb so high
I never wanna die

Born to be wild
Born to be wild

songs.title: The Best
songs.notes: BUSCAR VERSIÓN CON BAJADA DE DINÁMICA AL FINAL
songs.lyrics:
:: SOLO BOMBO Y CHARLES
:: ENTRAMOS TODOS JUNTOS MARCANDO 4
I call you when I need you, my heart's on fire
You come to me, come to me, wild and wired
Oh, you come to me
Give me everything I need
:: B C B C 
Give me a lifetime of promises and a world of dreams
Speak a language of love like you know what it means
Hm, and it can't be wrong
Take my heart and make it strong, baby

You're simply the best
Better than all the rest
Better than anyone
Anyone I ever met
I'm stuck on your heart
I hang on every word you say
Tear us apart? No, no
Baby, I would rather be dead

In your heart I see the start of every night and every day
In your eyes, I get lost, I get washed away
Just as long as I'm here in your arms
I could be in no better place

You're simply the best
Better than all the rest
Better than anyone
Anyone I ever met
Oh, I'm stuck on your heart
I hang on every word you say
Oh, tear us apart? No, no
Baby, I would rather be dead

Each time you leave me, I start losing control
You're walking away with my heart and my soul
I can feel you even when I'm alone
Oh, baby, don't let go

Oh, you're the best
Better than all the rest
Better than anyone
Anyone I ever met
Oh, I'm stuck on your heart
I hang on every word you say
Oh, tear us apart? No, no
Baby, I would rather be dead

Oh, you're the best

songs.title: No dudaría Caos Sonor
songs.lyrics:
Entrada acariciando platos, OJO FINAL: Parachururu.... volvemos a ritmo lento y a 4 final seco

Si pudiera olvidar
Todo aquello que fui
Si pudiera borrar
Todo lo que yo vi
No dudaría
No dudaría en volver a reír

Si pudiera explicar
Las vidas que quite
Si pudiera quemar
Las armas que use
No dudaría
No dudaría en volver a reír
B C BB BC, charles corcheas
Prometo ver la alegría
Escarmentar de la experiencia
Pero nunca, nunca más
Usar la violencia  
Prometo ver la alegría
Escarmentar de la experiencia
Pero nunca, nunca más
Usar la violencia     CCCCC

Parachuruchru.... x2

Si pudiera sembrar
Los campos que arrasé
Si pudiera devolver
La paz que quité
No dudaría
No dudaría en volver a reír

Si pudiera olvidar
Aquel llanto que oí
Si pudiera lograr
Apartarlo de mí
No dudaría
No dudaría en volver a reír

Prometo ver la alegría
Escarmentar de la experiencia
Pero nunca, nunca más
Usar la violencia
Prometo ver la alegría
Escarmentar de la experiencia
Pero nunca, nunca más
Usar la violencia     CCCCC

Parachuruchru.... x4
Volvemos a ritmo tranquilo, poca dinamica y final seco
Intentar al final dejar solo a Nino
songs.notes:
Entrada acariciando platos, OJO FINAL: Parachururu.... volvemos a ritmo lento y a 4 final seco

NINO:: Entrada acariciando platos, silencio hasta segundo "volver a reir"
final dejando solo a Nino
PRIMERO DOS COMPASES SOLO GUITARRA, LUEGO CON NINO TA TATA TATA TATA TA TA x2
songs.lyrics:
ENTRO TRAS 4 COMPASES DE NINO
:: Alta dinámica 4 compases
:: Aro ( reggae )
Aquí me tiene bien clavado
soltando las penas en un bar
brindando por su amor
aquí me tiene abandonado
bebiendo tequila pa'olvidar
y sacudirme así el dolor.
::::  C C en 4      B B B C B B B C
Donde estas bendita
donde te has metido
abre un poco el corazón
deja amarte corazón
ven y sácame de este bar

Estoy clavado, estoy herido
estoy ahogado en un bar
desesperado en el olvido amor
estoy ahogado en un bar
:: SILENCIO DE BATERÍA 2 COMPASES
Se que te buscan demasiados
que te pretenden cantidad
pero eso no es felicidad
y mi amor nunca se raja
y mi amor nunca
jamás te va a fallar
nunca jamás

Donde estas maldita
donde te has metido
abre un poco el corazón
deja amarte corazón
ven y sácame de este bar

Estoy clavado, estoy herido
estoy ahogado en un bar
desesperado en el olvido amor
estoy ahogado en un bar
::: CAJA A NEGRAS
muy desesperado, muy en el olvido
estoy ahogado en un bar

A-Bm             D
Dejate querer amor              
A
Quiero ser tu todo
        C#m
Y tu corazon
A-Bm             D
Ven a rescatarme amor
                A
Yo quiero ser tu sol
                 F#m
Yo quiero ser tu mar. Nooooo
:: SOLO
:: Aro ( reggae )
Ohhhh ohhh ohhh
Ohhhh ohhh ohhh ooh ehh
Aquí me tiene embriagado
Llorando de rabia en un bar
Brindando por su amor
Aquí me tiene bien clavado
Bebiendo tequila pa' olvidar todo
No es justo amor
:: CRESCENDO DE CAJA
Muy desesperado
Muy en el olvido
Estoy ahogado en un bar
Muy desesperado
Muy en el olvido
No, no, no, no, no
Estoy ahogado en un bar, yeah
:: SOLO GUITARRA 4 VUELTAS
:: FINAL CAJA A NEGRAS

songs.title: So Payaso
Rufino
songs.lyrics:
Hace algún tiempo en un bar
Conocí a un buen señor de cierta edad
Un ejecutivo
Jefe de una empresa de publicidad
Vestía traje de tweed
Olía a un perfume de Givenchy
Y sin ningún motivo
Se acerco hasta mi mesa y me dijo así
Dime muñeca? No me encuentras atractivo? ohhh
Vente muñeca, te invito a un aperitivo uhhhh

Rufino, me lleva a jugar al casino
Rufino, me invita a comer langostinos
Me gusta verle bailar
Con su aire de pingüino
Rufino es: Libertino, divino y superficial

Anoche lo encontré
Sentado en la terraza de un café
Disfrazado de moderno
Los años embutidos en un corsé
Bebiendo un daiquiri
Oliendo a su eterno Givenchy
Enfrascado en la lectura
Por fuera -La Luna- dentro el -ABC-
Dime muñeca, no me encuentras atractivo? ohhh
Vente muñeca, te invito a un aperitivo uhhhh

Rufino, me lleva a jugar al casino
Rufino, me invita a comer langostinos
Me gusta verle bailar
Con su aire de pingüino
Rufino es: Libertino, divino y superficial
:: S O L O
Dime muñeca, no me encuentras atractivo?
Vente muñeca, te invito a un aperitivo

Rufino, me lleva a jugar al casino
Rufino, me invita a comer langostinos
Me gusta verle bailar
Con su aire de pingüino
Rufino es: Libertino, divino y superficial
Rufino, me gusta verte bailar
Rufino
Me gusta verte bailar
Con su aire de pingüino
Rufino es: Libertino, divino y superficial
:: S O L O
 Rufino... fino...
 Rufino... fino...
 Rufino... fino...
 Rufino... fino...
 Rufino... fino...
 Rufino... fino...
:: 2 compases y final en seco en 1
songs.notes:
Guitarra entra en 2. 
 Golpe de bombo en 1 y caja en 3 en 5º compás
 Entramos directos en 4 tras 8 compases
 FINAL EN SECO EN 1 TRAS 6 "Rufinos" y 2 compases más
